section.heading: Annual report to Congress by Federal Surplus Commodities Corporation

content.p: The Federal Surplus Commodities Corporation shall submit to Congress on the first day of each regular session an annual report setting forth a statement of the activities, receipts, and expenditures of the Corporation during the previous year.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was previously classified to section 1293 of Title 7, Agriculture.

note.heading: Transfer of Functions
note.p: For transfer of functions of Federal Surplus Commodities Corporation, see Transfer of Functions note set out under section 712a of this title.
